name: audit-performance
description: Workflow to identify and fix performance issues in Flutter apps including widget rebuilds, memory leaks, and rendering bottlenecks

workflowSteps.name: Performance Profiling
workflowSteps.description: Use Flutter DevTools to identify bottlenecks

workflowSteps.name: Widget Rebuild Analysis
workflowSteps.description: Identify unnecessary rebuilds and optimize widget tree

workflowSteps.name: Memory Leak Detection
workflowSteps.description: Find and fix memory leaks (undisposed controllers, listeners, streams)

workflowSteps.name: Rendering Performance
workflowSteps.description: Optimize rendering with RepaintBoundary, const constructors, and caching

workflowSteps.name: Asset Optimization
workflowSteps.description: Optimize images, fonts, and other assets

workflowSteps.name: Implementation Plan
workflowSteps.description: Prioritized list of fixes with code examples
